name: Mandarin Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice with all ingredients except orange sections.
Mix well.
2. Lightly butter a crockpot.
3. Pour the rice mixture into the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on LOW for 4 to 6 hours or on HIGH for 2 to 3 hours.
5. Stir during the first 30 minutes.
6. During the last half-hour, stir in orange sections.
